## Evidence Type

Check the strongest evidence this PR provides:

- [ ] Code behavior with tests
- [ ] Documentation or explanation

## Validation

- [ ] Python tests run or not applicable
- [ ] JavaScript tests run or not applicable
- [ ] Generated reports are reproducible or not applicable

## Claims Check

- [ ] This PR does not claim production validation without production evidence.
- [ ] This PR does not claim compliance certification.
- [ ] This PR does not position SMERC as a replacement for IAM, OPA, SIEM, EDR, code review, or approval systems.
